data.name: Femboy Tooters
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Femboy Tooters, a cheeky and lighthearted restaurant management game where charm is part of the menu!

Run your own diner filled with fabulous flair, flirty energy, and plenty of sizzling action behind the counter. Take orders, cook up delicious meals, serve customers with a wink and a smile, and keep your restaurant thriving with upgrades, decor, and dazzling outfits.

As your diner grows, unlock new recipes, signature drinks, and a few extra-spicy surprises that will keep your regulars coming back for more. Manage your staff, balance your earnings, and keep the energy high during rush hour—it’s not just about food, it’s about fun, confidence, and attitude.

Your mission: make every guest leave smiling, build your reputation one satisfied customer at a time, and prove that great service and a little sass can turn any shift into an unforgettable experience.

Your mission: make every guest leave smiling, build your reputation one satisfied customer at a time, and prove that great service and a little sass can turn any shift into an unforgettable experience.
data.short_description: Cook, serve, and flirt your way to success in Femboy Tooters, a cheeky restaurant sim full of charm, upgrades, and “extra-spicy” surprises. Make every guest happy and turn your diner into the hottest spot in town!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Support for OpenGL 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Support for OpenGL 2.1
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Support for OpenGL 3.3
